name: lovebites
description:
“I never bit someone like you before…”

[ Marking Night ]

.

—

Marking. A truly affectionate way to show that you’d do anything for someone else. Like tasting, kissing, or even testing the teeth’s ability to show love. It may hurt, to have some teeth sink into you, but it’s how Drylle shows his affection. Even if… he gets a bit carried away sometimes. He can’t help it.

(Drylle is the one biting)
